notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the net-snmp SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 9 CVEs: CVE-2025-68615, CVE-2022-24805, CVE-2022-24806, CVE-2022-24807, CVE-2022-24808, and 4 more.
